title: Gangtok、Sikkim — 生活成本、住房与搬迁指南 [2026]
description: Gangtok、Sikkim的完整指南：生活成本、房价、社区、远程工作准备情况和搬迁建议。
content:
概述

Gangtok是Sikkim的一个城市，人口约100,000。The capital of Sikkim, a scenic Himalayan hill station with stunning views of Kanchenjunga, Buddhist monasteries, and vibrant culture.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
